properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Christian, have you wondered What your life in Christ should be? Does it seem that holiness Is a fair, elusive dream? Though you know "your life is hid In Christ," the Scriptures say, Do the things that press you Seem to keep you from God's way?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Have you listened to the tempter, Who will tell you not to try? He will flaunt you with your failures 'Til you grieve and mourn and sigh, And you think you must continue To struggle all alone But Christ stands ready, even now To make His strength your own!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In Christ there's power to live a holy life. In Christ we have all the strength we need, And when we choose to live by faith, He will uphold us by His grace, In Christ we can be free.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He has given promises, like keys to dungeon doors He'll open gates and windows that Were bolted shut before-- He wills us to be holy, Then He promises to give Christ Himself to dwell in us, His glorious life to live!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: God is able to make all grace Abound toward you and me. He can keep us from falling, And present us faultlessly He will keep what I've committed Unto Him against that day He will fill us with His Spirit And all His fullness, 'til we say: Glory and majesty Dominion and power Be unto the only wise God! Praise and thanksgiving From our hearts overflow For the fathomless depths of His Love!

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: In Christ there's power to live a holy life. In Christ we have all the strength we need, And when we choose to live by faith, He will uphold us by His grace, In Christ we can be sanctified and holy,

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: In Christ we can be free.
